blocks.text: I got a text from the Bike ship that the bike part came in! I went left for the shop first thing in the morning.

They installed it and it worked! They thought that it might not work due to the fact that the parts are from different companies and say they are not compatible. But hey, it works. I can now use a way way easier gear which will help with the many future mountains we need to climb.
Again another outstanding experience with bike shops in Greece!

blocks.caption: Bike with new tiny front gear rings

blocks.text: I met Adam and Alex back at the study cafe in Patras and we hung out there and had some breakfast.

I went back to the apartment we made Greek salad, we ate some of the meat pie and Nikos mom made, and I made this amazing dessert, copied from the restaurant in Ancient Olympia, apple Greek yogurt, honey, and cinnamon.
After the food I passed out. and slept for rest of the day on the couch.
In the evening Nikos Adam and I went out to listen to traditional music. Nikos friends were performing in a little Taverna in the center of town.
That's all for the 16th. I was extremely satisfied with the bike upgrade and Im excited to use it to climb steep steep hills in mountain trails
I'll post again in a few hours to make up. I have them all written until June 20th.
